patrol-state.json edit failed exact-match; new gene: use write instead of edit for small JSON

feishu plugin missing @larksuiteoapi/node-sdk caused 8 gateway restart failures today. New gene: detect plugin-blocked restarts, strategy to remove/disable unused plugin or install dep.

Widened gene_write_not_edit_json → gene_edit_exact_match_failure (covers JSON+markdown+all files). New gene for slug-generator auth mismatch (appeared 3 consecutive cycles, provider anthropic not in auth-profiles).

No new errors. Extracted inter-session announce routing capsule from 2026-02-22 memory: dev-mgr reported progress but user was not notified because reply went to cron session instead of Telegram announce.

Added failure mode (3): empty/whitespace newText rejected as missing parameter. From 2026-02-22 user conversation — edit tool deletion of config block failed because newText was whitespace-only. Fix: merge-replace pattern (match target+adjacent, replace with adjacent only).

Gateway restart at 00:28 UTC showed health check failure but gateway was actually running (listening on ws:// logged 1s before the error). All subsequent crons succeeded. New gene distinguishes benign race condition from real restart failures (covered by gene_gateway_restart_blocked_by_plugin).

Main session failed 4x trying to update dev-mgr patrol cron job: used internal jobs.json format (message/id/model-in-payload) instead of tool API format (text/jobId). New gene documents the schema difference + capsule with correct format and fallback strategy (edit jobs.json directly).

Dev-mgr patrol at 05:14 UTC hit message failed: Action send requires a target — error text did not match gene trigger (which only had target required). Widened trigger to include this variant. Also improved strategy: when target unavailable in cron/subagent, use sessions_send relay instead of message.send.

Brave Search 429 at 03:31 UTC — Free plan 1req/s rate limit hit during concurrent browsing. Noted in PCEC #21/#22 but not addressed. New gene with fallback strategy: web_fetch as backup, stagger concurrent calls, monitor quota.

System clean — all errors covered by existing genes, no new patterns. Updated SKILL.md v0.3.0→v0.4.0: added Idle Period Protocol (skip as valid outcome with events.jsonl logging), cost awareness section, optional idle-period work list, raised stagnation breaker threshold to 3 consecutive skips. Prevents forced low-value changes in calm periods.
New day (Feb 24), no gateway log yet, no cron errors, no new session errors. All yesterday signals covered. First skip under v0.4.0 protocol.

Proactive pruning of events.jsonl: archived 12 older events (evt_001–evt_012, Feb 21–22 era) to events-archive.jsonl. Main file reduced from 19 to 8 entries. Prevents hitting ~30 line threshold. Resets consecutive skip counter.

Discovered recurring auto-repair pattern: 11 occurrences across 6 sessions (Feb 3–24). Gateway inserts synthetic error results when tool calls have no matching result (caused by restarts/timeouts). Clusters on Feb 23 correlate with LLM cascade failure at 03:47–03:58 UTC. New gene catalogs this auto-healing mechanism.

3 stream_read_error events (02:59, 03:01, 03:28 UTC) — new failure mode where LLM SSE stream breaks mid-response. Distinct from timeout (no response) and 502 (error response). Widened gene trigger and strategy to cover all three provider failure modes. Today also saw gateway restart timeout (02:02) + LLM timeouts (03:41) — full instability sequence now documented.

All 6 gateway errors today match existing genes (429, restart timeout, LLM timeout, web_fetch 404s operational). No cron failures. No new session errors. 16 genes, 10 events — healthy state. Consecutive skip 1/3.

Stagnation breaker (3rd consecutive skip). Root-caused the most frequent recurring error: LocalMediaAccessError /data/images/... (4x Mar 6, 8x Feb 28, 12x Mar 3). When GEMINI_IMAGE_OUTPUT_DIR=/data/images (env var in openclaw.json), the script output_path is /data/images/... even though ~/.openclaw/workspace/images -> /data/images symlink exists. The os.path.abspath() on the display_path didn't reverse-map through symlinks. Fix: added workspace_display_path() function that checks if output path resolves to the same real directory as the workspace images symlink, and if so, returns the workspace-relative path. MEDIA: lines now output ~/.openclaw/workspace/images/... which is inside the message tool sandbox. Bumped gemini-imagegen v0.3.3→v0.3.4. 30 genes, 22 active events. Consecutive skip reset.

actions.summary: CRITICAL: Both jobs shared sessionKey 1480851680445595769 — weather timeout at 07:37 created zombie blocking DeepRouter at 09:00 (cascade). evt_110 audit said no action needed (wrong — didnt account for zombie persistence). Fix: patched both to unique sessionKeys (agent:main:cron:deeprouter-balance, agent:main:cron:weather-morning).
Added NEVER-SHARE-SESSIONKEY rule: zombie tasks persist indefinitely, even non-overlapping schedules cause cascade. Each cron job MUST have unique sessionKey.
